name: Feutune Light Acquisition Corporation Class A Common Stock
summary: Feutune Light Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus its search on target businesses in the biotech and pharmaceutical industry, focusing on the health and wellness sector. The company is based in Vienna, Austria.
